chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1438 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7106/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.6093/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 15.11.2023 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Abdul Sami Kalhoro, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Petitioner claims to be a Government Contractor. Per him, he was awarded a contract for construction of Cattle Colony at Shikarpur. He signed such agreement, but the respondents are not carrying out marks on the land (landmarks) to identify the site of working. Hence, he has filed this petition seeking directions to respondents to do so. Learned Counsel has failed to establish maintainability of this petition directly before this Court without approaching the relevant authorities first or the next forum in hierarchy for redressal of his grievance. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in limine along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
